logs.message: Unhandled exception in OrderSubmitService.submit: java.lang.NullPointerException at line 30 — request.getUserId() returned null, passed directly to orderRepository.create()
Unhandled exception in OrderSubmitService.submit: java.lang.NullPointerException at line 30 — request.getUserId() returned null

Unhandled exception in OrderSubmitService.submit: java.lang.NullPointerException — userId field is null in OrderSubmitRequest. The submit() method validates unitPrice and quantity but does NOT validate userId or skuId before passing them to orderRepository.create() at line 29-31.

orderRepository.create() received null userId from OrderSubmitService.submit() line 30. No null guard exists before the repository call. Compare with the existing null checks for unitPrice and quantity at lines 24-26 of the same method.

incoming order submit request missing userId field in request body. Client version 2.4.1 sends empty payload for optional fields. The submit() method in OrderSubmitService.java needs a null guard for userId and skuId similar to the existing unitPrice/quantity validation.
